hooks.command: echo '[Claude Code] Auto-compacting - context window full'

echo '## Post-Compact Context Restore

### Coding Rules
- Validation: run appropriate test/build command for the stack
- Files must stay under 500 lines
- developer owns code, tech-writer owns docs
- Always Read before Edit
- Max 200 lines per Edit operation

### CRITICAL ROUTING RULES
- NEVER use explore or general-purpose subagent types
- ALWAYS delegate via Task(subagent_type="agent-name", prompt="...")
- Available agents: analyst, architect, developer, debugger, reviewer, performance-optimizer, tech-writer, devops, researcher, gitops
- Routing: Bug->debugger, Code/features/tests->developer, Architecture/complex->architect, Docs->tech-writer, Review/security->reviewer, CI/CD->devops, DB/perf->performance-optimizer, Research->researcher, Git->gitops, Planning/ambiguous->analyst
- MANDATORY: Auto-route every message. No confirmation. Agent-first. NEVER edit code directly.'
